name: aviz-skills-installer
author: aviz85
description: Install skills from the AVIZ Skills Library. Use when user wants to install a skill, browse available skills, set up Claude Code skills, or asks about skill installation. Triggers on "install skill", "add skill", "setup skill", "available skills", "skill library", "browse skills".

name: claudability-analyzer
author: aviz85
description: Analyzes professions/jobs for Claude Code automation opportunities. Triggers: 'how can Claude help me', 'what can Claude do for', 'I'm a [profession]', 'help me as a [job]', 'I work as', describing their work + asking about Claude. Use whenever user mentions their profession/role and wants to discover what Claude can automate.
_original_description: Analyzes a user's profession, job, or daily tasks and breaks them down into specific Claude Code use cases. Use when someone describes what they do and asks 'how can Claude Code help me?' or wants to discover automation opportunities.

name: embed-subtitles
author: aviz85
description: Burn subtitles onto videos using FFmpeg. Use for: hardcode subtitles, embed captions, video subtitling.

name: gh-pages-deploy
author: aviz85
description: Deploy static or interactive frontend content to GitHub Pages using gh CLI. Use when the user wants to publish, share, or make accessible any HTML/CSS/JS content - including demos, prototypes, visualizations, landing pages, portfolios, documentation, interactive tools, games, or any browser-based project. Activate whenever content needs to be publicly viewable via URL, not just when "website" is explicitly mentioned.

name: html-to-pdf
author: aviz85
description: Convert HTML to PDF with pixel-perfect rendering and excellent Hebrew/RTL support. Use when the user asks to 'convert HTML to PDF', 'generate PDF from HTML', 'create PDF from webpage', 'export to PDF', or needs PDF generation with Hebrew text support.

name: learn
author: aviz85
description: Teach Claude ANY topic - code libraries, APIs, concepts, tools, methodologies, or domains. Researches via web and docs, then retains knowledge as a permanent skill. Use when user says "/learn <topic>", "learn about X", "teach yourself Y", "become an expert on Z". Examples - "/learn stripe" for payments, "/learn GTD" for productivity, "/learn israeli-tax-law" for domain knowledge.
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够通过查阅文档和网络资源，研究、学习并掌握任何指定主题（如代码库、API、概念或领域知识），然后将知识作为永久技能保存以备将来使用。

name: music-generator
author: aviz85
description: Generate AI music with ElevenLabs Music API. Use for: background music, soundtracks, jingles, theme songs, instrumental tracks, AI music composition.

name: presentation-architect
author: aviz85
description: Transform high-level ideas or briefs into fully structured presentation scripts saved as Markdown files, describing presentations slide by slide with exhaustive detail. Use this skill when users request: (1) Creating presentation blueprints or scripts, (2) Structuring slide decks from concepts, (3) Designing presentation narratives with detailed specifications for content, layout, typography, and visuals, or (4) Creating presentation documentation for designers or presenters.

name: translate-video
author: aviz85
description: Translate video subtitles to any language with native-quality refinement. Full pipeline: transcribe → translate → refine → embed RTL-safe subtitles. Use for: translate video, תרגם סרטון, video translation, foreign subtitles, Hebrew subtitles, translated captions.

name: wordpress-publisher
author: aviz85
description: Publish posts to WordPress. Use for: publish blog post, upload to WordPress, פרסם בבלוג.

name: youtube-downloader
author: aviz85
description: Download YouTube videos with quality presets. Use for: download youtube, yt download, video download, youtube to whatsapp, youtube mp3.

name: youtube-uploader
author: aviz85
description: Upload videos to YouTube with title, description, tags. Use for: youtube upload, publish video, share on youtube.

name: file-processing
author: aws-samples
description: Process and analyze CSV, JSON, and text files with data transformation, cleaning, analysis, and visualization capabilities

name: dsql
author: awslabs
description: Build with Aurora DSQL - manage schemas, execute queries, and handle migrations with DSQL-specific requirements. Use when developing a scalable or distributed database/application or user requests DSQL.

name: excalidraw-diagram
author: axtonliu
description: Generate Excalidraw diagrams from text content. Supports three output modes - Obsidian (.md), Standard (.excalidraw), and Animated (.excalidraw with animation order). Triggers on "Excalidraw", "画图", "流程图", "思维导图", "可视化", "diagram", "标准Excalidraw", "standard excalidraw", "Excalidraw动画", "动画图", "animate".
_original_description: Generate Excalidraw diagrams from text content for Obsidian. Use when user asks to create diagrams, flowcharts, mind maps, or visual representations in Excalidraw format. Triggers on "Excalidraw", "画图", "流程图", "思维导图", "可视化", "diagram".

name: mermaid-visualizer
author: axtonliu
description: Transform text content into professional Mermaid diagrams for presentations and documentation. Use when users ask to visualize concepts, create flowcharts, or make diagrams from text. Supports process flows, system architectures, comparisons, mindmaps, and more with built-in syntax error prevention.

name: obsidian-canvas-creator
author: axtonliu
description: Create Obsidian Canvas files from text content, supporting both MindMap and freeform layouts. Use this skill when users want to visualize content as an interactive canvas, create mind maps, or organize information spatially in Obsidian format.

name: create-slidev-presentation
author: b33eep
description: This skill should be used when asked to create or edit Slidev (sli.dev) presentation slide decks.
description_zh: 该技能用于创建和编辑基于Markdown与Vue组件的Slidev演示文稿。支持实时代码编辑、动画、图表，并可导出为PDF、PPTX等多种格式。

name: skill-creator
author: b33eep
description: This skill guides users through creating custom skills for claude-code-setup. Use when users want to create a new command or context skill.
description_zh: 此技能引导用户为Claude创建自定义技能。它提供了一个结构化的工作流程来定义、设计和实现新的命令或上下文技能，帮助用户扩展Claude的能力。

name: standards-gradle
author: b33eep
description: Gradle build tool standards focusing on Kotlin DSL. Covers project configuration, dependency management, and custom plugin/task development with Gradle 9 LTS.

name: standards-java
author: b33eep
description: Java coding standards for enterprise applications. Includes naming conventions, modern Java features, design patterns, and recommended tooling.

name: standards-javascript
author: b33eep
description: This skill provides JavaScript coding standards and is automatically loaded for JavaScript projects. It includes modern ES2025 patterns, async handling, and recommended tooling.

name: standards-kotlin
author: b33eep
description: Kotlin coding standards for modern applications. Includes naming conventions, coroutines, flows, modern Kotlin 2.3.0 features, and recommended tooling.

name: standards-python
author: b33eep
description: This skill provides Python coding standards and is automatically loaded for Python projects. It includes naming conventions, best practices, and recommended tooling.
description_zh: 该技能提供全面的Python编码标准，包括命名规范、项目结构、最佳实践以及针对FastAPI、Django和Flask等框架的工具推荐，以确保代码的整洁和可维护性。

name: standards-shell
author: b33eep
description: This skill provides Shell/Bash coding standards and is automatically loaded for shell projects. It includes defensive scripting patterns, best practices, and recommended tooling.
description_zh: 此技能提供全面的Shell/Bash编码标准，包括防御性脚本模式、最佳实践、命名规范以及推荐工具，用于编写健壮且可维护的Shell脚本。

name: standards-typescript
author: b33eep
description: This skill provides TypeScript coding standards and is automatically loaded for TypeScript projects. It includes naming conventions, best practices, and recommended tooling.
description_zh: 该技能为开发团队提供TypeScript编码标准和最佳实践，包括命名规范、项目结构指南、代码风格建议和实用类型用法，以确保代码一致性和可维护性。

name: youtube-transcript
author: b33eep
description: Download YouTube video transcripts with automatic frame extraction for visual references. Use when analyzing YouTube videos, tutorials, or conference talks.
description_zh: 下载YouTube视频字幕，并在关键时间点自动提取视觉参考帧，用于增强对教程、演示和教育内容的分析。

name: daily
author: ballred
description: Create daily notes and manage morning, midday, and evening routines. Structure daily planning, task review, and end-of-day reflection. Use for daily productivity routines or when asked to create today's note.

name: goal-tracking
author: ballred
description: Track progress toward 3-year, yearly, monthly, and weekly goals. Calculate completion percentages, surface stalled goals, connect daily tasks to objectives. Use for goal reviews and progress tracking.

name: obsidian-vault-ops
author: ballred
description: Read and write Obsidian vault files, manage wiki-links, process markdown with YAML frontmatter. Use when working with vault file operations, creating notes, or managing links.

name: onboard
author: ballred
description: Interactive vault setup and context loading. On first run, personalizes your vault. On subsequent runs, loads full context. Use at start of session or when Claude needs full vault context.
_original_description: Load CLAUDE.md context files from vault for comprehensive understanding. Discovers hierarchical context, recent notes, and project states. Use at start of session or when Claude needs full vault context.

name: push
author: ballred
description: Commit and push vault changes to Git with smart commit messages. Auto-stages files, creates meaningful commits, and syncs with remote. Use after making vault changes or at end of day.

name: weekly
author: ballred
description: Facilitate weekly review process with reflection, goal alignment, and planning. Create review notes, analyze past week, plan next week. Use on Sundays or whenever doing weekly planning.

name: analyze-video
author: barefootford
description: Adds visual descriptions to transcripts by extracting and analyzing video frames with ffmpeg. Creates visual transcript with periodic visual descriptions of the video clip. Use when all files have audio transcripts present (transcript) but don't yet have visual transcripts created (visual_transcript).
description_zh: 该技能通过提取和分析视频帧，为已有的音频转录稿添加视觉描述。它创建带有周期性视觉上下文增强的转录稿，有助于提高视频内容的可访问性。工作流程包括使用ffmpeg提取帧和手动编辑JSON添加视觉描述。
_original_description: This skill adds visual descriptions to existing audio transcripts by extracting and analyzing video frames. It creates enhanced transcripts with periodic visual context, useful for making video content more accessible. The workflow involves frame extraction with ffmpeg and manual JSON editing to add visual descriptions.

name: backup-library
author: barefootford
description: Creates compressed ZIP backups of libraries directory. Backs up library.yaml, transcripts, and roughcuts (not video files). This skill can also be useful when you need to restore a library.
description_zh: 一个Ruby脚本，用于创建带时间戳的libraries目录ZIP备份，排除视频文件。备份library.yaml、transcripts和roughcuts文件。提供清晰的验证和恢复命令。适用于项目数据保护，但仅限于特定目录结构。
_original_description: A Ruby script that creates timestamped ZIP backups of libraries directories, excluding video files. It backs up library.yaml, transcripts, and roughcuts. Provides clear commands for verification and restoration. Useful for project data protection but limited to specific directory structure.

name: release
author: barefootford
description: Creates a new ButterCut release with version bump, changelog, git tag, gem build, and GitHub release. Use when publishing a new version.
description_zh: 该技能自动化ButterCut Ruby gem的完整发布流程，包括版本更新、更新日志编写、Git标签、gem构建、RubyGems发布和GitHub发布创建，提供清晰的步骤指导和错误处理。
_original_description: This skill automates the complete release process for ButterCut Ruby gems. It handles version bumping, changelog updates, git tagging, gem building, RubyGems publishing, and GitHub release creation with clear step-by-step guidance and error handling.

name: roughcut
author: barefootford
description: Creates video rough cut yaml file for use with Buttercut gem. Concatenates visual transcripts with file markers, creates a roughcut yaml with clip selections, then exports to XML format. Use this skill when users want a "roughcut", "sequence" or "scene" generated. These are all the same thing, just with different lengths.
description_zh: 该技能根据视觉转录文件自动生成视频粗剪时间线。它能创建用于片段选择的YAML文件并导出为Final Cut Pro XML格式，支持长片和短片剪辑。包含转录完整性检查流程。
_original_description: Automates the creation of rough video cut timelines from visual transcripts. It generates YAML files for clip selection and exports to Final Cut Pro XML format, handling both full-length edits and short sequences. The skill includes prerequisite checks for transcript completeness.

name: setup
author: barefootford
description: Sets up a Mac for ButterCut. Installs all required dependencies (Homebrew, Ruby, Python, FFmpeg, WhisperX). Use when user says "install buttercut", "set up my mac", "get started", "first time setup", "install dependencies" or "check my installation".
description_zh: 该技能自动化在macOS上安装ButterCut所需依赖。它会检查当前系统状态，提供简单或高级两种安装路径，并验证最终安装结果。处理Homebrew、Ruby、Python、FFmpeg和WhisperX的安装。
_original_description: This skill automates the installation of ButterCut dependencies on macOS. It checks current system state, offers simple or advanced installation paths, and verifies the final setup. It handles Homebrew, Ruby, Python, FFmpeg, and WhisperX installations.

name: transcribe-audio
author: barefootford
description: Transcribes video audio using WhisperX, preserving original timestamps. Creates JSON transcript with word-level timing. Use when you need to generate audio transcripts for videos.
description_zh: 使用WhisperX转录视频音频，保留原始时间戳。生成带词级时间信息的JSON转录文件。专为需要精确时间对齐的视频分析流程设计，支持并行处理。
_original_description: Transcribes video audio using WhisperX with accurate timestamp preservation. Creates JSON transcripts with word-level timing. Designed for parallel execution in video analysis pipelines where timestamp alignment is critical.

name: update-buttercut
author: barefootford
description: A skill to automatically download and install the latest ButterCut version from GitHub while preserving libraries. Use when user wants to check for updates or update their installation for new features.
description_zh: 该技能自动化更新ButterCut CLI工具，提供两种更新路径：针对Git仓库使用git pull，或直接从GitHub下载。包含备份创建、版本验证和测试执行，确保更新不会破坏现有功能。工作流程处理未提交更改等边缘情况，并提供清晰的失败报告。
_original_description: This skill automates updating the ButterCut CLI tool with dual update paths: git pull for git repositories or direct download from GitHub. It includes backup creation, version verification, and test execution to ensure updates don't break existing functionality. The workflow handles edge cases like uncommitted changes and provides clear failure reporting.

name: ansible-error-handling
author: basher83
description: This skill should be used when implementing error handling in Ansible, using block/rescue/always patterns, creating retry logic with until/retries, handling expected failures gracefully, or providing clear error messages with assert and fail.
description_zh: 该技能提供了在Ansible剧本中实施健壮错误处理的模式和技巧，包括块/救援/始终结构、重试逻辑、输入验证和清晰的错误信息提示。

name: ansible-fundamentals
author: basher83
description: This skill should be used when writing Ansible playbooks, creating Ansible tasks, running ansible-playbook commands, selecting Ansible modules, or working with Ansible collections. Provides golden rules, FQCN requirements, module selection guidance, and execution patterns using uv run.
description_zh: 该技能提供编写生产级Ansible自动化的指南和最佳实践，包括黄金法则、模块选择、完全限定集合名称使用以及通过uv运行的执行模式。

name: ansible-idempotency
author: basher83
description: This skill should be used when writing idempotent Ansible tasks, using command or shell modules, implementing changed_when and failed_when directives, creating check-before-create patterns, or troubleshooting tasks that always show "changed".
description_zh: 提供编写幂等Ansible任务的技术，专注于command/shell模块、changed_when/failed_when指令和检查-创建模式，确保任务执行结果的一致性。

name: ansible-playbook-design
author: basher83
description: This skill should be used when creating new Ansible playbooks, designing playbook structure, implementing state-based playbooks with present/absent patterns, organizing plays and tasks, or structuring playbook variables. Covers play organization, variable scoping, and state-based design patterns.
description_zh: 此技能提供设计结构良好的Ansible剧本的模式和最佳实践，包括基于状态的设计、剧本组织、变量作用域和任务管理，用于基础设施自动化。

name: ansible-proxmox
author: basher83
description: This skill should be used when automating Proxmox VE with Ansible, creating VMs or templates, managing Proxmox clusters, using community.proxmox collection, or deciding between native modules and CLI commands (pvecm, pveceph, qm).
description_zh: 该技能使用Ansible自动化管理Proxmox VE基础设施。它提供使用community.proxmox集合进行虚拟机创建、用户管理和ACL的专家指导，并以幂等方式处理集群和CEPH操作的CLI命令。

name: ansible-role-design
author: basher83
description: This skill should be used when creating Ansible roles, designing role directory structure, organizing role variables in defaults vs vars, writing role handlers, or structuring role tasks. Based on analysis of 7 production geerlingguy roles.
description_zh: 提供基于生产级角色分析的最佳实践，用于设计Ansible角色，包括标准目录结构、任务组织和变量管理。

name: ansible-secrets
author: basher83
description: This skill should be used when working with secrets in Ansible playbooks, integrating Infisical vault, using no_log directive, retrieving credentials securely, or implementing fallback patterns for secrets. Covers the reusable Infisical lookup task.
description_zh: 该技能为Ansible剧本提供安全的密钥管理，集成Infisical保险库。包含可复用的查找任务、备用模式、身份验证方法和安全最佳实践，如no_log指令。

name: ansible-testing
author: basher83
description: This skill should be used when running ansible-lint, configuring linting rules, testing Ansible playbooks, validating playbook syntax, or setting up integration tests. Covers ansible-lint configuration and testing strategies.
description_zh: 此技能提供测试Ansible自动化代码的指导，包括运行ansible-lint、配置代码检查规则、验证剧本语法，以及实施幂等性和集成测试策略。

name: claude-agent-sdk
author: basher83
description: This skill should be used when building applications with the Claude Agent SDK (Python). Use for creating orchestrators with subagents, configuring agents programmatically, setting up hooks and permissions, and following SDK best practices. Trigger when implementing agentic workflows, multi-agent systems, or SDK-based automation.
description_zh: 此技能提供使用Claude Agent SDK（Python）构建应用程序的指导，包括创建编排器、配置代理、设置钩子/权限以及实现智能体工作流。

name: coderabbit
author: basher83
description: AI-powered code review using CodeRabbit CLI and GitHub integration. Use when running local code reviews before commits ("run coderabbit", "review my changes"), configuring .coderabbit.yaml files, integrating CodeRabbit with Claude Code for autonomous review workflows, using @coderabbitai commands in pull requests, or setting up automated code review pipelines.
description_zh: 一款AI驱动的代码审查工具，与GitHub和CLI集成，用于检测错误、安全问题并执行标准。它支持与Claude Code的自主审查工作流和自动化管道。

name: git-workflow
author: basher83
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "make commits", "commit all changes", "create a branch", "name a branch", "organize commits", "conventional commits", "generate changelog", "release version", "bump version", or needs guidance on git workflow best practices including commit organization, branch naming, and conventional commit format.
description_zh: 该技能提供Git工作流指导和自动化，包括创建原子提交、遵循约定式提交格式、分支命名、生成变更日志以及维护版本控制最佳实践。

name: multi-agent-composition
author: basher83
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "choose between skill and agent", "compose multi-agent system", "orchestrate agents", "manage agent context", "design component architecture", "should I use a skill or agent", "when to use hooks vs MCP", "build orchestrator workflow", needs decision frameworks for Claude Code components (skills, sub-agents, hooks, MCP servers, slash commands), context management patterns, or wants to build effective multi-component agentic systems with proper orchestration and anti-patterns guidance.
description_zh: 该技能提供使用Claude Code组件（技能、子智能体、钩子、MCP服务器等）设计和编排多智能体系统的架构指导与决策框架。

name: netbox-powerdns-integration
author: basher83
description: NetBox IPAM and PowerDNS integration for automated DNS record management.
description_zh: 提供集成NetBox IPAM与PowerDNS的专家指导，实现DNS记录自动化管理，包括API查询、虚拟机创建、IP地址管理操作和命名规范验证。

name: proxmox-infrastructure
author: basher83
description: Manage the Matrix/Virgo-Core Proxmox VE cluster (nodes Foxtrot, Golf, Hotel - MINISFORUM MS-A2 with AMD Ryzen 9 9955HX). Covers VM provisioning, VLAN networking, CEPH storage, and automation via Python (proxmoxer), Ansible (community.general.proxmox), and Terraform (Telmate/proxmox).
description_zh: 该技能为管理Proxmox VE虚拟化基础设施提供专家指导，包括虚拟机配置、使用cloud-init创建模板、网络设置、存储管理以及API自动化。
_original_description: Proxmox VE cluster management including VM provisioning, template creation with cloud-init, QEMU guest agent integration, storage pool management, VLAN-aware bridge configuration, and Proxmox API interactions. Use when working with Proxmox VE, creating VM templates, configuring Proxmox networking, managing CEPH storage, troubleshooting VM deployment issues, or interacting with Proxmox API.

name: python-uv-scripts
author: basher83
description: Python single-file script development using uv and PEP 723 inline metadata. Prevents invalid patterns like [tool.uv.metadata]. Use when creating standalone Python utilities, converting scripts to uv format, managing script dependencies, implementing script testing, or establishing team standards for script development.
description_zh: 使用 uv 和 PEP 723 内联元数据创建生产就绪的 Python 单文件脚本的专家指南。涵盖依赖管理、脚本转换、最佳实践以及避免独立实用程序常见陷阱。

name: skill-factory
author: basher83
description: Research-backed skill creation workflow with automated firecrawl research gathering, multi-tier validation, and comprehensive auditing. Use when "create skills with research automation", "build research-backed skills", "validate skills end-to-end", "automate skill research and creation", needs 9-phase workflow from research through final audit, wants firecrawl-powered research combined with validation, or requires quality-assured skill creation following Anthropic specifications for Claude Code.
description_zh: 一个用于创建高质量Claude Code技能的综合性工作流程编排器，具备自动化研究、多级验证和符合Anthropic规范的合规性审计功能。

name: code-card-news-generator
author: bear2u
description: Generate code explanation cards with syntax highlighting for tutorials and education. Creates title cards and explanation cards with Korean descriptions and code examples.
description_zh: 为代码教程和教育内容生成带有语法高亮的解释卡片。自动创建标题卡和函数/概念说明卡，包含韩语描述和代码示例，输出适合社交媒体分享的方形图片。
_original_description: Generates visually appealing code explanation cards optimized for social media. Takes code concepts and creates title cards plus detailed explanation cards with Korean descriptions, syntax-highlighted code snippets, and explanations. Outputs 1080x1080 pixel images ready for sharing.

name: code-changelog
author: bear2u
description: AI가 만든 모든 코드 변경사항을 reviews 폴더에 기록하고 간단한 HTML 뷰어로 웹 브라우저에서 실시간 확인할 수 있습니다. 매 수정마다 문서가 생성되고 Python 서버로 즉시 확인 가능합니다.
description_zh: 自动将AI生成的代码变更记录到Markdown文件，并通过Python HTTP服务器提供实时HTML查看器。为增量开发步骤提供文档化支持。
_original_description: Automatically logs AI-generated code changes to markdown files in a 'reviews' folder and serves them via a simple Python HTTP server with an auto-updating HTML viewer. Provides real-time documentation of incremental development steps.

name: codex-claude-cursor-loop
author: bear2u
description: Orchestrates a triple-AI engineering loop where Claude plans, Codex validates logic and reviews code, and Cursor implements, with continuous feedback for optimal code quality
description_zh: 该技能编排了一个三AI协作流程：Claude负责规划，Codex验证逻辑和代码审查，Cursor执行实现。通过多阶段验证反馈循环，在早期发现潜在问题。方法系统化，但需要访问多个AI服务。
_original_description: This skill orchestrates a three-AI workflow where Claude plans, Codex validates logic and reviews code, and Cursor implements changes. It creates a feedback loop with multiple validation stages before final implementation, catching issues early. The approach is systematic but requires access to multiple AI services.

name: codex-claude-loop
author: bear2u
description: Orchestrates a dual-AI engineering loop where Claude Code plans and implements, while Codex validates and reviews, with continuous feedback for optimal code quality
description_zh: 实现双AI工程循环：Claude负责代码实现，Codex验证计划和审查变更。通过两个AI模型之间的持续反馈，在部署前发现逻辑错误、安全问题和架构缺陷，形成自我修正系统。
_original_description: Implements a dual-AI engineering loop where Claude handles code implementation while Codex validates plans and reviews changes. Creates a self-correcting system with continuous feedback between two AI models to catch logic errors, security issues, and architectural flaws before deployment.

name: flutter-init
author: bear2u
description: Use when user wants to create a new Flutter project (Todo/Habit/Note/Expense/Custom domain) with Clean Architecture, Riverpod 3.0, Drift, and modern Flutter stack
description_zh: 该技能通过交互式问答生成基于Clean Architecture、Riverpod状态管理和Drift数据库的Flutter应用。引导用户选择领域（待办/习惯/笔记/支出/自定义）和技术栈预设，自动创建包含实体定义、仓库、状态管理和UI界面的完整项目，并处理代码生成、依赖安装和项目验证。
_original_description: This skill interactively generates Flutter apps with Clean Architecture, Riverpod state management, and Drift database. It guides users through domain selection (Todo/Habit/Note/Expense/Custom) and stack presets, then creates complete projects with entity definitions, repositories, providers, and UI screens. It handles code generation, dependency installation, and project validation.

name: gemini-logo-remover
author: bear2u
description: Remove Gemini logos, watermarks, or AI-generated image markers using OpenCV inpainting. Use this skill when the user asks to remove Gemini logo, AI watermark, or any logo/watermark from images.
description_zh: 该技能使用OpenCV修复技术移除Gemini标识和水印。提供基于坐标和角落的移除功能，包含示例代码。实现直接但需手动调整坐标，在背景均匀的小区域效果最佳。
_original_description: This skill removes Gemini logos and watermarks from images using OpenCV inpainting. It provides functions for coordinate-based and corner-based removal with example code. The implementation is straightforward but requires manual coordinate adjustment and works best on small areas with uniform backgrounds.

name: landing-page-guide
author: bear2u
description: Comprehensive guide for creating effective landing pages using Next.js or React. This skill should be used when users request to create landing pages, marketing pages, or product pages that require the 11 essential elements for high-converting landing pages. Specifically designed for Next.js 14+ App Router with ShadCN UI components.
description_zh: 该技能为使用Next.js 14+和ShadCN UI构建落地页提供结构化框架。它强制要求包含11个转化必备元素，提供完整组件示例和SEO元数据设置。指南涵盖项目结构、必需依赖和实现工作流。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured framework for building landing pages with Next.js 14+ and ShadCN UI. It enforces 11 essential elements for conversion, offers complete component examples, and includes SEO metadata setup. The guide covers project structure, required dependencies, and implementation workflow.

name: landing-page-guide-v2
author: bear2u
description: Create distinctive, high-converting landing pages that combine proven conversion elements with exceptional design quality. Build beautiful, memorable landing pages using Next.js 14+ and ShadCN UI that avoid generic AI aesthetics while following the 11 essential elements framework.
description_zh: 该技能基于DESIGNNAS的11个关键元素框架，生成完整的Next.js落地页。它提供具体的美学方向（极简、大胆、复古等）、详细的组件代码和设计系统指导，避免生成通用AI风格。输出包括字体选择、配色方案和生产就绪的React组件。
_original_description: This skill generates complete Next.js landing pages using the DESIGNNAS 11-element framework. It provides specific aesthetic directions (minimalist, bold, retro, etc.), detailed component code, and design system guidance to avoid generic AI aesthetics. Output includes typography choices, color palettes, and production-ready React components.

name: midjourney-card-news-backgrounds
author: bear2u
description: Generate Midjourney prompts for 600x600 card news background images based on topic, mood, and style preferences. Use when user requests card news backgrounds or Instagram post backgrounds.
description_zh: 为600x600卡片新闻背景生成结构化Midjourney提示词。提供清晰的提示模板、不同主题的风格分类以及文本叠加优化指南。专注于社交媒体图形的实际输出。
_original_description: Generates structured Midjourney prompts for 600x600 card news backgrounds. Provides clear prompt templates, style categories for different topics, and text overlay optimization guidelines. Focuses on practical output for social media graphics.

name: nextjs15-init
author: bear2u
description: Use when user wants to create a new Next.js 15 project (Todo/Blog/Dashboard/E-commerce/Custom domain) with App Router, ShadCN, Zustand, Tanstack Query, and modern Next.js stack
description_zh: 基于Next.js 15创建项目，提供Todo、博客、仪表盘、电商或自定义领域模板，并配置ShadCN、Zustand等现代技术栈。通过交互式向导选择预设配置，生成完整的CRUD应用结构。
_original_description: Creates Next.js 15 projects with domain-specific templates (Todo, Blog, Dashboard, E-commerce, Custom) and configures modern stacks like ShadCN, Zustand, and Tanstack Query. Guides users through interactive setup with preset choices and generates complete CRUD apps.

name: prompt-enhancer
author: bear2u
description: Enhance user prompts by analyzing project context (code structure, dependencies, conventions, existing patterns). Use when users provide brief development requests that would benefit from project-specific context to generate more accurate, contextually-aware prompts.
description_zh: 该技能通过分析用户简短开发请求和现有项目文件，生成详细、符合上下文的实现需求文档。它遵循清晰的四步工作流，提供针对不同技术栈的模板，并在执行前要求用户确认，有效解决了编码协助中提示词模糊的问题。
_original_description: This skill analyzes a user's brief development request and existing project files to generate detailed, context-aware implementation requirements. It follows a clear four-step workflow, provides stack-specific templates (Flutter, Next.js, Python), and requires user confirmation before proceeding. It addresses the common problem of vague prompts in coding assistance.

name: web-to-markdown
author: bear2u
description: 웹페이지 URL을 입력받아 마크다운 형태로 변환하여 저장합니다. 웹 문서를 로컬 마크다운 파일로 아카이빙하거나 정리할 때 유용합니다.
description_zh: 将网页转换为Markdown，提供标准、AI优化和双模式三种选项。通过Playwright回退处理动态内容，包含结构化提示以确保输出一致性。适用于存档文章、文档和研究资料。
_original_description: Converts web pages to Markdown with three modes: standard, AI-optimized for context use, and dual mode for both. Handles dynamic content via Playwright fallback and includes structured prompts for consistent output. Useful for archiving articles, documentation, and research materials.

name: workthrough
author: bear2u
description: Use this skill proactively and automatically after completing ANY development work. AI agent summarizes: what was done, what was changed/improved, and suggests future additions/improvements - all concisely in Korean.
description_zh: 该技能自动为开发任务（如修复 Bug、实现功能或重构代码）生成结构化文档。它记录相关背景、代码变更和验证结果，以 Markdown 格式保存，并使用基于日期的文件名。生成的文档成为项目可搜索的开发历史。
_original_description: This skill automatically creates structured documentation for development tasks like bug fixes, features, or refactors. It captures context, code changes, and verification results in markdown format, saving files with date-based names. The documentation becomes a searchable project history for developers.

name: litestream
author: benbjohnson
description: Expert knowledge for contributing to Litestream, a standalone disaster recovery tool for SQLite. Provides architectural understanding, code patterns, critical rules, and debugging procedures for WAL monitoring, LTX replication format, storage backend implementation, multi-level compaction, and SQLite page management. Use when working with Litestream source code, writing storage backends, debugging replication issues, implementing compaction logic, or handling SQLite WAL operations.

name: dev-workflow
author: beshkenadze
description: Orchestrate full development workflow. Use when implementing features, starting structured development, or user mentions "workflow" or "implement issues".
description_zh: 该技能编排了从问题创建到PR合并的完整开发工作流。它提供了具体的Git操作命令、工作树管理，并集成了多种代码审查工具。文档包含具体的错误处理参考，并支持Gitea和GitHub。
_original_description: This skill orchestrates a complete development workflow from issue creation to PR merge. It provides concrete commands for Git operations, worktree management, and integrates with multiple code review tools. The documentation includes specific error handling references and supports both Gitea and GitHub.

name: git-worktree-workflow
author: beshkenadze
description: Manage git worktrees for branch isolation. Use when creating feature branches, working on isolated tasks, creating PRs, and cleaning up after merge.

name: gitea-tea
author: beshkenadze
description: Manage Gitea via CLI. Use when user mentions "tea", "gitea cli", or needs terminal-based Gitea operations.

name: gitea-wiki
author: beshkenadze
description: Manage Gitea wiki pages. Use when working with wiki content, creating documentation, or updating wiki pages.

name: python-uv
author: beshkenadze
description: Manage Python with uv instead of pip/virtualenv. Use when running Python scripts, installing packages, or creating virtual environments.

name: research-guide
author: beshkenadze
description: Research best practices, guides, and libraries. Use when needing documentation, recommendations, implementation guidance, or library comparisons.

name: skill-with-scripts
author: beshkenadze
description: A template for skills that include executable code for deterministic operations.

name: all-plan
author: bfly123
description: Collaborative planning using abstract roles (designer + inspiration + reviewer).
_original_description: Collaborative planning with all mounted CLIs (Codex, Claude, Gemini, OpenCode) for comprehensive solution design. Codex acts as coordinator.

name: help
author: biocontext-ai
description: Provides information about using the skill-to-mcp server and how to install additional skills

name: mcp-setup
author: bitsoex
description: Configure MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers for various IDEs. Includes setup, troubleshooting, and discovery management.

name: pull-request-creator
author: biwsantang
description: Creates and updates well-formatted pull requests using GitHub CLI. Use when creating PRs, pull requests, submitting code for review, or when the user mentions "pr", "pull request", "create pr", or wants to open a code review. Analyzes all commits since branch divergence and handles existing PRs gracefully.
description_zh: 一个通过命令行自动创建和更新 GitHub 拉取请求的工具。分析提交记录、检测目标分支、使用模板并高效管理 PR 工作流。

name: terminal-pane-tab-management
author: biwsantang
description: Manages terminal panes and tabs for multi-instance workflows. Use when spawning multiple instances, creating new panes/tabs, running commands in separate terminals, splitting the terminal, or when the user mentions "new pane", "new tab", "split terminal", "spawn instance", "multiple terminals", or needs parallel terminal sessions.
description_zh: 管理Zellij终端多路复用器的窗格和标签页，用于组织多实例工作流。支持并行终端会话、在独立窗格中运行命令以及创建高效多任务开发布局。

name: english-text-editor
author: bkircher
description: Suggests improvements for English language text but does not rewrite the original. Use when asked to correct spelling or wording and the text is English.

name: gh-code-review
author: bkircher
description: Conduct a thorough and in-depth code review. Use this skill when conducting a code review for a PR on GitHub.

name: gh-run-failure
author: bkircher
description: Use to analyze failures in GitHub pipelines or jobs.

name: git-commit-message
author: bkircher
description: Formulate a git commit message. Use this skill whenever asked to create a commit message.

name: jira-read-ticket
author: bkircher
description: Use whenever a user mentions or references a Jira ticket and you want to pull out description, comments, or more.

name: jira-write-ticket
author: bkircher
description: Use when asked to write a Jira ticket.

name: terraform
author: bkircher
description: Use when writing Terraform.

name: unit-testing
author: bkircher
description: Use when writing or updating unit tests (in any language).

name: bfl-api
author: black-forest-labs
description: BFL FLUX API integration guide covering endpoints, async polling patterns, rate limiting, error handling, webhooks, and regional endpoints with Python and TypeScript code examples.

name: flux-best-practices
author: black-forest-labs
description: Comprehensive guide for BFL FLUX image generation models. Covers prompting, T2I, I2I, structured JSON, hex colors, typography, multi-reference editing, and model-specific best practices for FLUX.2 and FLUX.1 families.

name: observability
author: blackpwnguin
description: Real-time monitoring dashboard for PAI multi-agent activity. USE WHEN user says 'start observability', 'stop dashboard', 'restart observability', 'monitor agents', 'show agent activity', or needs to debug multi-agent workflows.
description_zh: PAI多智能体活动实时监控面板。

name: nextjs-server-side-error-debugging
author: blader
description:
Debug getServerSideProps and getStaticProps errors in Next.js. Use when: 
(1) Page shows generic error but browser console is empty, (2) API routes 
return 500 with no details, (3) Server-side code fails silently, (4) Error 
only occurs on refresh not client navigation. Check terminal/server logs 
instead of browser for actual error messages.

name: prisma-connection-pool-exhaustion
author: blader
description:
Fix Prisma "Too many connections" and connection pool exhaustion errors in 
serverless environments (Vercel, AWS Lambda, Netlify). Use when: (1) Error 
"P2024: Timed out fetching a new connection from the pool", (2) PostgreSQL 
"too many connections for role", (3) Database works locally but fails in 
production serverless, (4) Intermittent database timeouts under load.

name: typescript-circular-dependency
author: blader
description:
Detect and resolve TypeScript/JavaScript circular import dependencies. Use when:
(1) "Cannot access 'X' before initialization" at runtime, (2) Import returns 
undefined unexpectedly, (3) "ReferenceError: Cannot access X before initialization",
(4) Type errors that disappear when you change import order, (5) Jest/Vitest tests 
fail with undefined imports that work in browser.

name: debugging
author: block
description: Debugging guidelines and best practices

name: stars-we-prefer
author: block
description: Our preferred stars for celestial navigation and astronomical reference

name: rfp-analyzer
author: bobchao
description: Performs structured analysis of RFP (Request for Proposal) or requirement documents, identifying stakeholders, functional modules, system constraints, and generating key clarification questions. This Skill focuses on 'analysis and decomposition' to prepare for subsequent User Story writing.

name: story-refiner
author: bobchao
description: Evaluates User Story quality and automatically corrects items not meeting standards. Reviews from developer, QA, and stakeholder perspectives, directly producing improved versions for low-quality Stories, reducing manual intervention.
